seed_instruction: Draft an email to a hotel requesting room availability for next weekend.
org_constraint: The email must contain exactly five sentences.
new_constraint: The email must contain three paragraphs, each consisting of at least five sentences.
instruction: Draft an email to a hotel requesting room availability for next weekend. The email must contain exactly five sentences. The email must contain three paragraphs, each consisting of at least five sentences.
response:
Subject: Room Availability Inquiry for Next Weekend

Dear Front Desk Team, I hope this message finds you well and that your operations are running smoothly this week. We are writing to you today because we are very excited about the possibility of staying at your esteemed hotel during our upcoming trip. Our family has heard wonderful things about your exceptional service and clean facilities from several friends who have visited recently. Therefore, we wanted to reach out directly to see if you might have rooms available for next weekend specifically. Please let us know how many different room types you currently have open so we can make an informed decision quickly.

We are planning to arrive on Friday evening around six o'clock and would ideally like to check out by Sunday noon. It is important to note that one of our travelers requires a hypoallergenic pillow and bedding due to a mild allergy to standard materials. Could you please confirm if such special requests can be accommodated without any additional difficulty or extra charge for the guests? Furthermore, do you offer any special packages that include breakfast or early check-in options for families traveling together? Your response regarding these specific needs will greatly help us in finalizing our travel arrangements for the entire group.

Thank you very much for taking the time to read our inquiry and for considering our request with care and attention to detail. We look forward to hearing from you soon so that we can secure our reservation before dates fill up completely. If there are any alternative dates available should this weekend be fully booked, please feel free to suggest those options to us as well. We truly appreciate your hard work and dedication to maintaining such a high standard of hospitality throughout the year. We hope to hear a positive reply from your team within the next two days at the latest.<|im_end|>
